name: clode-build
description: clode's OWN build-time toolchain (esbuild, postject) — what `clode build`/`clode build --naude` compile and package WITH. Distinct from deps/claude (what the BUILT apps need at runtime) and from clode's own runtime surface (node builtins only, see test/clode-self-deps.test.cjs). MANIFEST ONLY, never installed here: esbuild/postject ship native per-platform binaries, so scripts/build-bundle.mjs and scripts/build-naude.mjs each copy this manifest into a per-platform-tag build/<tag> dir and `npm ci`/`npm install` THERE instead of into deps/clode/node_modules.
